stemHtml: The co-pilot who was the pilot-flying becomes incapacitated. How can the commander take over controls and disable the co-pilot’s sidestick?

options.a: By pushing the priority button on his/her sidestick.
options.b: By pushing the priority button on the co-pilot’s side.
options.c: By disconnecting the autopilot and engaging it again.
options.d: By pressing the “DUAL INPUT” button on the panel until the light goes off.
